meaning: vt.陈列,展览,显示n.陈列,展览,显示 显示,显示器
examples: These statistics display a definite trend.
They made a bar graph to display the results.
Many companies are choosing to display their wares online.
We asked, what if we designed a sound system that was a platform for the display?
The hotel will put the items on display in June, running through 31 December.
